CustomField.description:
Number of days since service was rendered for records with an outstanding balance.
DATE FALLBACK LOGIC (Updated Jan 2026): Some completed services have no ServiceRenderedDate because they never went through the Close Trip flow. This formula uses fallback dates to ensure all completed services are properly aged:
1. ServiceRenderedDate__c (primary - set by Close Trip flow) 2. ShoppingAppointmentComplete__c (for Will Call services that bypass Trip workflow) 3. LastAppointmentDate__c (for Delivery services completed outside Trip workflow) 4. CreatedDate (last resort)
Returns null only if balance is zero.
CustomField.formula: IF( BalanceDue__c > 0, TODAY() - IF( NOT(ISBLANK(ServiceRenderedDate__c)), DATEVALUE(ServiceRenderedDate__c), IF( AND( TEXT(Subtype__c) = "Will Call", NOT(ISBLANK(ShoppingAppointmentComplete__c)) ), DATEVALUE(ShoppingAppointmentComplete__c), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(LastAppointmentDate__c)), LastAppointmentDate__c, DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) ) ) ), null )
CustomField.label: Days Outstanding
